title: Born in Chaos Jade compat
description: Hides infected diamond ore in Jade by displaying it as regular diamond ore
body:
The project hides infected diamond ore by displaying it in Jade as regular diamond ore.

This makes resource gathering less predictable. Players can no longer tell in advance whether the ore is safe and must take risks when mining.

For example, you may see diamond ore through Jade but won’t know if it’s infected — adding tension and an element of surprise.

This mod is perfect for players who want less “cheaty” information and a more hardcore gameplay experience.
